description: The 'What This Enables' section presents the path to the full conjecture too assertively. While the qualifications in point 1 are already present, the opening sentence ('opens a concrete path to the full conjecture') and point 2 ('the conjecture would be resolved computationally') are too strong given that making B-K effective remains an open analytic problem. Weaken these claims.
action_taken: The 'What This Enables' section presents the path to the full conjecture too assertively. While the qualifications in point 1 are already present, the opening sentence ('opens a concrete path to the full conjecture') and point 2 ('the conjecture would be resolved computationally') are too strong given that making B-K effective remains an open analytic problem. Weaken these claims.
